property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Apache NetBeans\jdk\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Apache NetBeans\jdk\bin;C:\app\marta\product\21c\dbhomeXE\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Player\bin\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Hitachi Software Engineering\FX-DuoDriver\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\ichueca\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Roaming\npm;;C:\Users\ichueca\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;.

testcase.name: guardarValoracion_deberiaLanzarExcepcionSiEstrellasNoValidas
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: drop table if exists generos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists serie_genero cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuariosTmdb cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists valoraciones cascade Hibernate: drop sequence if exists SEQ_GENERO Hibernate: drop sequence if exists SEQ_SERIE Hibernate: drop sequence if exists SEQ_USUARIO Hibernate: drop sequence if exists SEQ_VALORACION Hibernate: create sequence SEQ_GENERO start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence SEQ_SERIE start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence SEQ_USUARIO start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence SEQ_VALORACION start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create table generos ( id bigint not null, nombre varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table serie_genero ( genero_id bigint not null, serie_id bigint not null, primary key (genero_id, serie_id) ) Hibernate: create table series ( fecha_primer_aire date, tmdb_id integer not null unique, id bigint not null, titulo varchar(200) not null, poster_url varchar(500), sinopsis varchar(2000), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table usuariosTmdb ( id bigint not null, nombre_usuario varchar(50) not null unique, email varchar(100) not null unique, password varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table valoraciones ( estrellas integer not null, fecha date not null, id bigint not null, serie_id bigint not null, usuario_id bigint not null, comentario varchar(1000), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists serie_genero add constraint FK7f05102mh93kt45ud5k9jdc52 foreign key (genero_id) references generos Hibernate: alter table if exists serie_genero add constraint FKmkew3sdhlo4leu12qk1cug30m foreign key (serie_id) references series Hibernate: alter table if exists valoraciones add constraint FKaqe1nt671ov8igierss7an2sa foreign key (serie_id) references series Hibernate: alter table if exists valoraciones add constraint FK7oqyytmnal58ny1nhpvvllap1 foreign key (usuario_id) references usuariosTmdb Hibernate: delete from valoraciones v1_0 Hibernate: delete from serie_genero to_delete_ Hibernate: delete from series s1_0 Hibernate: delete from usuariosTmdb u1_0 Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_USUARIO Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_SERIE Hibernate: insert into usuariosTmdb (email, nombre_usuario, password, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into series (fecha_primer_aire, poster_url, sinopsis, titulo, tmdb_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
testcase.system-err: abr 21, 2026 9:22:18 A. M. org.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper logPersistenceUnitInformation INFO: HHH008540: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: seriesjpa_test] abr 21, 2026 9:22:18 A. M. org.hibernate.Version logVersion INFO: HHH000001: Hibernate ORM core version 7.2.6.Final abr 21, 2026 9:22:18 A. M. org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProvider configure WARN: HHH10001002: Using built-in connection pool (not intended for production use) abr 21, 2026 9:22:19 A. M. org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.dialect.internal.DialectFactoryImpl constructDialect WARN: HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) abr 21, 2026 9:22:19 A. M. org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.env.internal.JdbcEnvironmentInitiator logConnectionInfo INFO: HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:h2:mem:seriesdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1] Database driver: H2 JDBC Driver Database dialect: H2Dialect Database version: 2.2.224 Default catalog/schema: SERIESDB/PUBLIC Autocommit mode: false Isolation level: READ_COMMITTED JDBC fetch size: 100 Pool: DriverManagerConnectionProvider Minimum pool size: 1 Maximum pool size: 20 abr 21, 2026 9:22:20 A. M. org.hibernate.engine.transaction.jta.platform.internal.JtaPlatformInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration)

testcase.name: guardarValoracion_deberiaCrearNuevaValoracion
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: delete from valoraciones v1_0 Hibernate: delete from serie_genero to_delete_ Hibernate: delete from series s1_0 Hibernate: delete from usuariosTmdb u1_0 Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_USUARIO Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_SERIE Hibernate: insert into usuariosTmdb (email, nombre_usuario, password, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into series (fecha_primer_aire, poster_url, sinopsis, titulo, tmdb_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.email, u1_0.nombre_usuario, u1_0.password from usuariosTmdb u1_0 where u1_0.id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.fecha_primer_aire, s1_0.poster_url, s1_0.sinopsis, s1_0.titulo, s1_0.tmdb_id from series s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.comentario, v1_0.estrellas, v1_0.fecha, v1_0.serie_id, v1_0.usuario_id from valoraciones v1_0 where v1_0.usuario_id=? and v1_0.serie_id=? Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_VALORACION Hibernate: insert into valoraciones (comentario, estrellas, fecha, serie_id, usuario_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.comentario, v1_0.estrellas, v1_0.fecha, v1_0.serie_id, v1_0.usuario_id from valoraciones v1_0 Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.email, u1_0.nombre_usuario, u1_0.password from usuariosTmdb u1_0 where u1_0.id=?

testcase.name: guardarValoracion_deberiaActualizarSiYaExiste
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: delete from valoraciones v1_0 Hibernate: delete from serie_genero to_delete_ Hibernate: delete from series s1_0 Hibernate: delete from usuariosTmdb u1_0 Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_USUARIO Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_SERIE Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_VALORACION Hibernate: insert into usuariosTmdb (email, nombre_usuario, password, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into series (fecha_primer_aire, poster_url, sinopsis, titulo, tmdb_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into valoraciones (comentario, estrellas, fecha, serie_id, usuario_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.email, u1_0.nombre_usuario, u1_0.password from usuariosTmdb u1_0 where u1_0.id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.fecha_primer_aire, s1_0.poster_url, s1_0.sinopsis, s1_0.titulo, s1_0.tmdb_id from series s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.comentario, v1_0.estrellas, v1_0.fecha, v1_0.serie_id, v1_0.usuario_id from valoraciones v1_0 where v1_0.usuario_id=? and v1_0.serie_id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.usuario_id, v1_0.id, v1_0.comentario, v1_0.estrellas, v1_0.fecha, v1_0.serie_id from valoraciones v1_0 where v1_0.usuario_id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.serie_id, v1_0.id, v1_0.comentario, v1_0.estrellas, v1_0.fecha, v1_0.usuario_id, u1_0.id, u1_0.email, u1_0.nombre_usuario, u1_0.password from valoraciones v1_0 left join usuariosTmdb u1_0 on u1_0.id=v1_0.usuario_id where v1_0.serie_id=? Hibernate: select next value for SEQ_VALORACION Hibernate: insert into valoraciones (comentario, estrellas, fecha, serie_id, usuario_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: delete from valoraciones where id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.comentario, v1_0.estrellas, v1_0.fecha, v1_0.serie_id, v1_0.usuario_id from valoraciones v1_0 Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.email, u1_0.nombre_usuario, u1_0.password from usuariosTmdb u1_0 where u1_0.id=?
